Призывает мегаприслужника-мутанта с {FAMILIARHEALTHPERCENT} % здоровья и {FAMILIARATTACK} % атаки, получаемых от героя.

Каждый удар мегаприслужника-мутанта дает цели следующий недуг:
💎⭐🏴  Titan Hunter SUMMON OPEN NOW! Summon Heroes who are devastating against Titans!  💎⭐🏴
💎⭐🏴  Titan Hunter SUMMON OPEN NOW! Summon Heroes who are devastating against Titans!  💎⭐🏴

Beschwört einen Abweichungs-Mega-Lakaien mit {FAMILIARHEALTHPERCENT} % LP und {FAMILIARATTACK} % Angriff vom Wirker.

Jeder Treffer eines Abweichungs-Mega-Lakaien verleiht dem Ziel folgende negative Statusänderung:
💎⭐🏴  Titan Hunter SUMMON OPEN NOW! Summon Heroes who are devastating against Titans!  💎⭐🏴
💎⭐🏴  Titan Hunter SUMMON OPEN NOW! Summon Heroes who are devastating against Titans!  💎⭐🏴

Åkallar en monstrummegaundersåte med {FAMILIARHEALTHPERCENT} % hälsa och {FAMILIARATTACK} % attack som ärvs från anfallaren. 

Varje träff från en monstrummegaundersåte ger målet följande negativa statuseffekt:
💎⭐🏴  Titan Hunter SUMMON OPEN NOW! Summon Heroes who are devastating against Titans!  💎⭐🏴
💎⭐🏴  Titan Hunter SUMMON OPEN NOW! Summon Heroes who are devastating against Titans!  💎⭐🏴

The [#!]Dunes Summon[#] features three Legendary Season V Heroes. There is also a chance to get the current Hero of the Month.

The Dunes Summon has an increased chance for [#!]Legendary[#] Heroes.

Summons can be done with gems or [#!]Dunes Coins[#] which can be obtained by completing [#!]Season V stages[#] for the first time. A single summon costs 100 Dunes Coins.

After every {0} summons a [#!]Dynasty of Dunes Bonus Chest[#] is granted. You can claim a maximum of [#!]{1}[#] chests during each Dunes Summon event.
💎⭐🏴  Titan Hunter SUMMON OPEN NOW! Summon Heroes who are devastating against Titans!  💎⭐🏴
💎⭐🏴  Titan Hunter SUMMON OPEN NOW! Summon Heroes who are devastating against Titans!  💎⭐🏴

Invoque un méga sbire aberration avec {FAMILIARHEALTHPERCENT} % de PV et {FAMILIARATTACK} % d'attaque hérités du lanceur.

Chaque coup d'un méga sbire aberration donne l'effet négatif suivant à la cible :
💎⭐🏴  Titan Hunter SUMMON OPEN NOW! Summon Heroes who are devastating against Titans!  💎⭐🏴

Convoca um ajudante mega Aberração. O ajudante herda {FAMILIARHEALTHPERCENT}% de PV e {FAMILIARATTACK}% de ataque do invocador.

Cada ataque de um ajudante mega Aberração dá ao alvo o seguinte mal de status:
💎⭐🏴  Titan Hunter SUMMON OPEN NOW! Summon Heroes who are devastating against Titans!  💎⭐🏴
💎⭐🏴  Titan Hunter SUMMON OPEN NOW! Summon Heroes who are devastating against Titans!  💎⭐🏴

Kutsuu hirvitys-megakäskyläisen, joka perii loitsijalta {FAMILIARHEALTHPERCENT} % terveyttä ja {FAMILIARATTACK} % hyökkäystä.

Jokainen hirvitys-megakäskyläisen osuma aiheuttaa kohteelle seuraavan vaivan:
💎⭐🏴  Titan Hunter SUMMON OPEN NOW! Summon Heroes who are devastating against Titans!  💎⭐🏴
💎⭐🏴  Titan Hunter SUMMON OPEN NOW! Summon Heroes who are devastating against Titans!  💎⭐🏴
💎⭐🏴  Titan Hunter SUMMON OPEN NOW! Summon Heroes who are devastating against Titans!  💎⭐🏴

Påkaller en avviker-megaundersått med {FAMILIARHEALTHPERCENT} % HP og {FAMILIARATTACK} % angrep nedarvet fra brukeren. 

Hvert treff fra en avviker-megaundersått påfører målet følgende statuslidelse:
💎⭐🏴  Titan Hunter SUMMON OPEN NOW! Summon Heroes who are devastating against Titans!  💎⭐🏴

Roept een atypische megavolgeling aan met {FAMILIARHEALTHPERCENT}% gezondheid en {FAMILIARATTACK}% aanval van de spreukspreker.

Elke treffer van de atypische megavolgeling geeft het doelwit het volgende negatieve statuseffect:
💎⭐🏴  Titan Hunter SUMMON OPEN NOW! Summon Heroes who are devastating against Titans!  💎⭐🏴
